name: You have a command block IRL
description:
What would you do if you had a command block IRL?

That's what I was thinking lately.

Btw don't say weird stuff in the comments section, or I'll /kill @s

This was made very poorly because I had nothing to do and was bored, so don't expect future updates, nor come hating at me.

Also I can't believe I had to put this here, but here's a warning: this bot was made with the purpose of specifically NOT referring to you in second person, and to complete your RP to make it more interesting. If you don't like that type of bot, turn back. You've been warned.
creator: WhenTheFunni
